title: Review: core round 20
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM -- Three unbounded deserialization paths remain: Chat.text, PeerGroupUpdate.role, and PaymentAction::Sent zero-amount. The broader deserialization hardening from previous rounds is thorough; these are residual gaps.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty: protocol.rs relay-facing structs not exhaustively enumerated; MLS library surface not reviewed. Would raise confidence with: full serde deserialize_with audit across all structs, openmls CVE check.
